primary_official_source.name: EUR-Lex -- Official Journal of the European Union

obligations.source_quote: High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed in such a way that they achieve an appropriate level of accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity, and that they perform consistently in those respects throughout their lifecycle.

decomposed_atoms.requirement: System SHALL achieve an appropriate level of accuracy
System SHALL achieve an appropriate level of robustness
System SHALL achieve an appropriate level of cybersecurity
System SHALL perform consistently throughout its lifecycle

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for accuracy metric definitions, evaluation scripts, performance benchmarks, and monitoring infrastructure that tracks metrics over time
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether accuracy/robustness/cybersecurity levels are 'appropriate' for the specific use case
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect testing infrastructure but cannot assess appropriateness

obligations.source_quote: To address the technical aspects of how to measure the appropriate levels of accuracy and robustness set out in paragraph 1 and any other relevant performance metrics, the Commission shall, in cooperation with relevant stakeholders and organisations such as metrology and benchmarking authorities, encourage, as appropriate, the development of benchmarks and measurement methodologies.
obligations.note: Commission obligation to encourage benchmarks. Uses 'shall' not 'is empowered' — correctly classified as obligation. NOT a provider obligation.

decomposed_atoms.requirement: The Commission SHALL encourage development of benchmarks and measurement methodologies

obligations.source_quote: The levels of accuracy and the relevant accuracy metrics of high-risk AI systems shall be declared in the accompanying instructions of use.

decomposed_atoms.requirement: Accuracy levels SHALL be declared in instructions of use
Relevant accuracy metrics SHALL be declared in instructions of use

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for model cards, instructions of use documents, or README files that contain accuracy metric values and metric type definitions
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether declared metrics are complete and appropriate
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect metric declarations in documentation but cannot assess completeness

obligations.source_quote: High-risk AI systems shall be as resilient as possible regarding errors, faults or inconsistencies that may occur within the system or the environment in which the system operates, in particular due to their interaction with natural persons or other systems. Technical and organisational measures shall be taken in this regard.

decomposed_atoms.description: System must be resilient to errors/faults/inconsistencies
decomposed_atoms.requirement: System SHALL be as resilient as possible regarding errors, faults or inconsistencies
Technical measures SHALL be taken for resilience
Organisational measures SHALL be taken for resilience

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for input validation frameworks, error handling patterns (try/except, error boundaries), graceful degradation logic, and integration test coverage
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether resilience measures are adequate for the specific deployment context
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect error handling and fallback patterns but cannot assess adequacy

obligations.source_quote: High-risk AI systems that continue to learn after being placed on the market or put into service shall be developed in such a way as to eliminate or reduce as far as possible the risk of possibly biased outputs influencing input for future operations (feedback loops), and as to ensure that any such feedback loops are duly addressed with appropriate mitigation measures.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to systems that continue to learn after deployment (online learning / continual learning)

decomposed_atoms.description: Feedback loop bias risk must be reduced
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL eliminate or reduce risk of biased outputs influencing future inputs
SHALL ensure feedback loops are duly addressed with appropriate mitigation measures

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for online learning patterns, model retraining pipelines, feedback loop detection, drift monitoring, data pipeline from outputs to inputs
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether feedback loop mitigation is adequate
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect online learning patterns but cannot assess mitigation adequacy

obligations.source_quote: The robustness of high-risk AI systems may be achieved through technical redundancy solutions, which may include backup or fail-safe plans.
obligations.note: Flexibility permission: robustness may be achieved through technical redundancy solutions. This is one permitted approach, not the only approach. Not an obligation.

decomposed_atoms.description: Technical redundancy is a permitted approach to robustness
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Robustness MAY be achieved through technical redundancy solutions

decomposed_atoms.description: Backup or fail-safe plans are a permitted redundancy approach
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Technical redundancy solutions MAY include backup or fail-safe plans

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for backup systems, fail-safe patterns, redundancy configurations, fallback logic, circuit breakers
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether redundancy solutions are adequate for the specific robustness requirements
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect redundancy patterns but cannot assess whether they achieve required robustness level

obligations.source_quote: High-risk AI systems shall be resilient against attempts by unauthorised third parties to alter their use, outputs or performance by exploiting system vulnerabilities.

decomposed_atoms.requirement: System SHALL be resilient against unauthorized third-party attempts to alter use, outputs, or performance
Cybersecurity technical solutions SHALL be appropriate to relevant circumstances and risks
Technical solutions SHALL address AI-specific vulnerabilities: data poisoning, model poisoning, adversarial examples, model evasion, confidentiality attacks, model flaws

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for rate limiting, authentication/authorization, vulnerability scanning tools, security headers, and access control patterns
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether cybersecurity measures address AI-specific attack vectors
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect security patterns but cannot assess AI-specific vulnerability coverage

obligations.source_quote: The technical solutions to address AI specific vulnerabilities shall include, where appropriate, measures to prevent, detect, respond to, resolve and control for attacks trying to manipulate the training data set (data poisoning), or pre-trained components used in training (model poisoning), inputs designed to cause the AI model to make a mistake (adversarial examples or model evasion), confidentiality attacks or model flaws.

decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL include measures to prevent data poisoning attacks
SHALL include measures to prevent model poisoning
SHALL include measures to prevent adversarial examples / model evasion
SHALL include measures to prevent confidentiality attacks
SHALL include measures to control for model flaws

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for adversarial training, input sanitization, model integrity verification, access control on training data, differential privacy, model watermarking
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether AI-specific security measures are comprehensive
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect some security patterns but AI-specific attack mitigation is highly specialized

scope_notes.general: ART15-OBL-1, OBL-3, OBL-4, OBL-5, OBL-5b -- apply to ALL high-risk AI systems
scope_notes.conditional: ART15-OBL-4b -- only systems that continue learning after deployment
